revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-5-475

Alternative term: Indeterminate redundant

A term applied to a structure which is provided with a redundant number of nodes so that bending moments and reactions need to be determined not only from the laws of equilibrium but taking calculated deflection into account.


{{IALAFooter}}
